variant.description: Current exit policy, configured horizon, 5m, 10 symbols max, 5% premium cap.
Earlier trail at +30%, lock +15%, give back 20%.
Exit if still down 15% after 3 signal bars.
Exit if still down 20% after 6 signal bars.
Do not hold overnight unless position is at least flat.
Do not hold overnight unless mark is up at least 10%.
Do not hold overnight unless mark is up at least 20%.
Hard stop -30%, trail 35/15/20, early loss exit after 6 bars.
Hard stop -30% with overnight +10% minimum hold rule.
Trail 35/15/20 with overnight +10% minimum hold rule.
Hard stop -30%, trail 35/15/20 with 5x/10x tightening, overnight +10%, early loss after 6 bars.
Best h8 policy plus conditional exits: cut low-quality earlier, let high-quality runners breathe.
